_comment: Stage 0 proof-of-concept corpus (asa-moonshine-migration-plan). English-only pilot scope per epic setara-ri76 decision — Moonshine has no Indonesian model, so Indonesian/code-switch phrases from the original plan are dropped, not benchmarked. All audio is synthesized TTS (macOS `say` for command phrases, Pocket-TTS asa_default voice reused from setara-core for assistant cues) — this is a clean-speech sanity/regression corpus, NOT a substitute for the plan's real-mic noise matrix (fan noise, keyboard noise, far mic, Android mic, Bluetooth headset). Those require real recordings supplied separately before the Stage 0 pass gate can be fully signed off.

fixtures.expected: create a release plan for Raksara
rerun failed scenarios from build one point zero point one
